GeneralDescription.SourceString: The sly, wild leader of the Winter Tricksters.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: The sly, wild leader of the Winter Tricksters.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The leader of the rebellious Winter Tricksters, Volpez is all about using mischief and mayhem to outwit enemies of the Island... and his stick-in-the-mud brother Fennix, too.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: The leader of the rebellious Winter Tricksters, Volpez is all about using mischief and mayhem to outwit enemies of the Island... and his stick-in-the-mud brother Fennix, too.
